task_completion.description: Verify the new contract is named 'Vanguard Data Systems - Enterprise SLA 2025'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a contract record or creation form where the contract name/title field is exactly 'Vanguard Data Systems - Enterprise SLA 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contract is linked to the 'Vanguard Data Systems' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Account', 'Customer', or 'Related To' field on the contract form showing 'Vanguard Data Systems'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contract status is set to 'In Progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Status' dropdown or field showing 'In Progress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Start Date is '01/01/2025' and End Date is '12/31/2025'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Start Date' showing 01/01/2025 (or 2025-01-01) and 'End Date' showing 12/31/2025 (or 2025-12-31).

task_completion.description: Verify the Customer Signed Date is '12/15/2024'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Customer Signed Date' or 'Signed Date' field showing 12/15/2024 (or 2024-12-15).

task_completion.description: Verify the Total Contract Value is '18900.00'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Total Contract Value', 'Amount', or 'Value' field showing 18900.00 (or 18,900).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application GUI to create the contract.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a CRM, ERP, or database UI being navigated and filled out, rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or direct SQL injection to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands like INSERT or UPDATE.

integrity.description: The data was entered into actual form fields and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for filled input fields, dropdown selections, and a 'Save' or 'Submit' button being clicked, rather than text pasted into a single unrelated document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new contract details are: Name: 'Vanguard Data Systems - Enterprise SLA 2025', Account: 'Vanguard Data Systems', Status: 'In Progress', Start Date: '2025-01-01' (or 01/01/2025), End Date: '2025-12-31' (or 12/31/2025), Customer Signed Date: '2024-12-15' (or 12/15/2024), and Total Contract Value: 18900.00.
